title: Trilegal advises Agrow Allied Ventures on raising ₹186 crore from ICICI Ventures
description: Agrow Allied Ventures Private Limited has raised ₹186 crore from a combination of primary capital infusion by India Advantage Fund S5 I, a fund managed by ICICI Venture Funds Management Company Limited; and secondary sale by existing shareholders.Trilegal advised Agrow Allied Ventures, along with its promoters and existing shareholders, on this fundraise.The transaction team consisted Nikhil Sachdeva (Partner), and supported by Associates C.N. Yashwanth and Madhur Patel.Nikhil SachdevaAgrow Alli
